creator: ohauer@gmx.de
text:
Hi is there a change to submit the patch?

Luckily I searched for an existing PR, before write a new one.

As Richard wrote, users already moved will not see any difference.

Maybe it is saver to rename the option, so users get next time the
configure dialog during the build.
Additional change the text to something like this:

OPTIONS+= INTDATE64 "Build with 64-bit date/time (server default for PG v8.4)" on
